basic_details.job_title: ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 39 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Senior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on the official website esic.gov.in. A total of 39 Senior Resident vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with MD/MS/DNB or Super-specialty qualification (MCh/DM/DrNB/FNB) as per NMC guidelines
qualification.details: MBBS with MD/MS/DNB or Super-specialty qualification (MCh/DM/DrNB/FNB) as per NMC guidelines. For Anesthesiology with Surgical Super Specialty, Cardiology, Cardiothoracic Surgery, Critical Care Medicine, Diagnostic and Interventional Radiology, Endocrinology & Metabolism, Medical Gastroenterology, Medical Oncology, Neonatology, Nephrology, Neurology, Neurosurgery, Surgical Gastroenterology: In accordance with the latest guidelines of the National Medical Commission (NMC/MCI). Preferably MCh/DM/DrNB/FNB for Super-specialty Departments.

rows.employees_state_insurance_corporation_es: MBBS with MD/MS/DNB or Super-specialty qualification (MCh/DM/DrNB/FNB) as per NMC guidelines

content_sections.heading: ESIC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ESIC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ESIC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: MBBS with MD/MS/DNB or Super-specialty qualification (MCh/DM/DrNB/FNB) as per NMC guidelines. For Anesthesiology with Surgical Super Specialty, Cardiology, Cardiothoracic Surgery, Critical Care Medicine, Diagnostic and Interventional Radiology, Endocrinology & Metabolism, Medical Gastroenterology, Medical Oncology, Neonatology, Nephrology, Neurology, Neurosurgery, Surgical Gastroenterology: In accordance with the latest guidelines of the National Medical Commission (NMC/MCI). Preferably MCh/DM/DrNB/FNB for Super-specialty Departments.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies for Senior Resident posts at ESIC?
faq.answer: There are a total of 39 vacancies announced for the Senior Resident posts by the Employees State Insurance Corporation (ESIC).

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held on 16th July 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Senior Resident posts is 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 148669 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What are the essential qualifications required for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree with MD/MS/DNB or a Super-specialty qualification (MCh/DM/DrNB/FNB) as per NMC guidelines.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for ESIC Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Document Verification followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview for ESIC Senior Resident posts going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the ESIC office in Faridabad, Haryana, PIN Code: 121001.

faq.question: Q9. What is the reporting time for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to report for the walk-in interview between 09:00 AM and 10:00 AM.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any application fees for SC/ST and Women candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates. However, General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 500/-.
